description_long: This is a tall, arched gravestone made of weathered stone, featuring a pointed Gothic-style top and a rectangular base. The front face is inscribed with several lines of text, some of which are still legible, and is adorned with subtle floral reliefs near the arch. The stone shows signs of aging, with discoloration, moss, and lichen growth particularly visible at the base. The sides are relatively plain, with some column-like detailing supporting the arch. The back is unadorned, showing only the natural weathering of the stone. The overall appearance suggests it is a historic monument, likely found in a cemetery or memorial park.
description: A weathered, arched gravestone with inscribed text and subtle floral reliefs, set on a rectangular base with moss and lichen growth.
description_view_0: The front view shows the inscribed text, floral reliefs near the arch, and moss at the base.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the thickness of the stone, column-like detailing, and moss on the lower section.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a plain, unadorned surface with visible weathering and discoloration.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the stone's thickness and some moss at the base.
attribute_inscription: Multiple lines of English text are engraved on the front face, with varying font sizes and some weathering affecting legibility. The inscriptions appear to be memorial information.
attribute_ornamentation: Subtle floral reliefs and decorative motifs are present near the arch at the top of the front face.
attribute_base_design: The base is rectangular, solid, and slightly wider than the main shaft, with visible moss and lichen growth. It features simple, block-like steps and a weathered surface.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is a pointed Gothic arch, smoothly finished with no additional decorations beyond the floral reliefs below.
attribute_surrounding_features: Moss and lichen are present at the base; no other surrounding features are visible.
